mapper.select: SELECT cr.comment_report_id, cr.comment_id, cr.member_id, cr.comment_report_reason, cr.comment_report_status, cr.comment_report_created_at, cr.comment_report_content, reporter.member_name AS reporter_name, c.comment_content, c.member_id AS reported_member_id, author.member_name AS reported_member_name FROM comment_report cr JOIN member reporter ON cr.member_id = reporter.member_id JOIN comment c ON cr.comment_id = c.comment_id JOIN member author ON c.member_id = author.member_id ORDER BY cr.comment_report_created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_report (comment_id, member_id, comment_report_reason, comment_report_content) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{memberId}, #{commentReportReason}, #{commentReportContent})
